PVT Data

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x14
Size:
0x4
Source:
pvt_rf.rdl

Description

Read-only register containing the latest PVT measurement result.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:10] reserved rw 0x0 -
[9:0] data_out_pclk r 0x0 data_out_pclk

Field Descriptions

data_out_pclk - data_out_pclk

10-bit PVT measurement output, valid when pvt_core_intr=1.
